title: CEC Gyanesh Kumar warns of tough action against misuse of AI, deepfakes in campaign
description: New Delhi, March 15, 2026 While announcing the Assembly election dates for Assam, West Bengal, Kerala, Tamil Nadu and Puducherry, Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar on Sunday sent out a strong message to those who attempt to misuse deepfakes and AI in the election campaign to mislead voters. “As far as misinformation and deepfakes are [...]The post CEC Gyanesh Kumar warns of tough action against misuse of AI, deepfakes in campaign appeared first on Yes Punjab News.

title: A practical guide to the 6 categories of AI cloud infrastructure in 2026
description: Platform teams and AI engineers are facing an unprecedented wave of decision paralysis. The rollout of NVIDIA’s Blackwell and GB200 architectures has flooded the market with new GPU options. At the same time, a parallel explosion of specialized providers now competes for every stage of the AI pipeline. Picking the right cloud for an AI [...]

title: The Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Most Likely to Mint New Millionaires
description: True millionaire-maker stocks are when you buy out-of-favor companies benefiting from a technological revolution.

title: ECI warns against AI in poll campaign: Why Assam is a test case ?
description: EC warning gains urgency in Assam, where AI-generated political content already stirs controversy ahead of high-stakes polls

title: Polisi: Viral Foto Pelaku Teror Air Keras ke Aktivis KontraS Olahan AI
description: Polda Metro menyatakan foto terduga pelaku penyiraman air keras ke Andrie Yunus adalah hasil editan AI. Polisi minta masyarakat bijak dalam menyebar informasi.
